Object.Name: Lemonbeat Status Message
Object.Description1: Logging capability for unexpected device events. Used for debugging purposes only.

Item.Name: Type
Item.Description: The type of the status. 1: Public Key 2: Memory Information 3: Device Description 4: Value Description 5: Value 6: Partner Information 7: Action 8: Calculation 9: Timer 10: Calendar 11: State machine 12: Firmware update 13: Configuration 100: Exi 101: System 200: Application

Item.Name: Code
Item.Description: Status code in the context of the status type.

Item.Name: Level
Item.Description: Severity level 0: Disabled 1: Important 2: Error 3: Warning 4: Info 5: Debug

Item.Name: Data
Item.Description: Additional information in the context of type and code. Up to 4 bytes encoded as HEX string.
